Curation

Curation Stages

StagePurposeMethodConfig
Exact DedupRemove identical conversationsSHA-256 content hashdeduplicate.exact_match
Semantic DedupRemove near-duplicatesSentence embeddings + cosine similaritydeduplicate.semantic_threshold
PII RedactionRemove personal infoMicrosoft Presidiopii_redact.enabled
Quality FilterRemove low-quality dataHeuristics (length, ratio, etc.)quality.enabled

Configuration

Exact Deduplication

Computes SHA-256 hash of normalized conversation content. Removes exact duplicates (same messages, same order). Fast: O(n) with hash set lookup. Typical removal: 3-8% of conversations.

Semantic Deduplication

Uses sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings. Computes cosine similarity between conversation embeddings. Pairs above threshold (default 0.95) marked as duplicates. Keeps first occurrence, removes subsequent. Typical removal: 2-5% additional.

PII Redaction (Presidio)

Entity TypeExampleAction
PERSON”John Smith”Replace with [PERSON]
EMAIL_ADDRESS”john@example.com”Replace with [EMAIL]
PHONE_NUMBER”+1-555-123-4567”Replace with [PHONE]
LOCATION”San Francisco”Replace with [LOCATION]
CREDIT_CARD”4242 4242 4242 4242”Replace with [CREDIT_CARD]
CRYPTO_WALLET”0x742d35Cc…”Replace with [WALLET]

Custom patterns via pii_redact.custom_patterns.

Quality Filters

FilterDescriptionDefault
min_messagesMinimum conversation turns2
max_tokensMaximum tokens (estimated)8192
min_user_ratioUser/(User+Assistant) minimum0.1
max_user_ratioUser/(User+Assistant) maximum0.9
min_avg_message_lenAverage chars per message10

Running Curation

Standalone

During Import
